docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $410.00 FILED BY PATTERSON, DANE AS TO DEFENDANT ALPERT, CAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ALPERT, CAREN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-06-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE STATED SERVED JUL-04-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALPERT, CAREN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATTERSON, DANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALPERT, CAREN PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION OF THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF PLAINTIFF'S LOSS, DAMAGE OR HARM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: [X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
